mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boarding_order (order_no, user_id, pet_id, room_id, check_in, check_out, total_price, status, room_type_name, room_number, pet_name, coupon_id, coupon_amount, final_price) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{petId}, #{roomId}, #{checkIn}, #{checkOut}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{roomTypeName}, #{roomNumber}, #{petName}, #{couponId}, #{couponAmount}, #{finalPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, pet_id, room_id, check_in, check_out, total_price, status, create_time, room_type_name, room_number, pet_name, coupon_id, coupon_amount, final_price FROM boarding_order WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, pet_id, room_id, check_in, check_out, total_price, status, create_time, room_type_name, room_number, pet_name, coupon_id, coupon_amount, final_price FROM boarding_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, pet_id, room_id, check_in, check_out, total_price, status, create_time, room_type_name, room_number, pet_name, coupon_id, coupon_amount, final_price FROM boarding_order ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE boarding_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM boarding_order WHERE id IN
#{id}
